basics.name: Yihui Wang
basics.summary: Undergraduate student in Software Engineering at Hefei University of Technology. Research interests include time series analysis, large language models, computer vision and interpretability. Recipient of the National Scholarship with extensive experience in competitive programming and research projects.

awards.title: National Scholarship
awards.summary: Highest honor for undergraduate students in China

awards.title: Bronze Medal, 50th ICPC Asia Regional Contest (Chengdu)
Bronze Medal, 11th CCPC Jinan Regional Contest
Bronze Medal, 11th CCPC Zhengzhou Regional Contest
Bronze Medal, CCSP 2025
awards.summary: National College Student Computer Systems and Programming Competition

awards.title: First Prize, Anhui Province Robot Competition - Programming Track
awards.summary: Two consecutive years of first prize

awards.title: Gold Medal, Anhui Province College Student Innovation Competition
awards.summary: Project: 'HuanNa Technology: Leader in Intelligent Lithium Battery Disassembly and Green Direct Recycling Technology'

projects.name: Multi-dimensional Time Series Feature Alignment and Temporal Prediction Method Optimization
projects.description: Science-Education Integration Project Extension, Hefei University of Technology
highlights: Research on encoding methods and modeling based on multi-dimensional temporal features
Research on inference prediction optimization algorithms based on eliminating feature Hamming distance

projects.name: Power Battery Status Measurement System Based on Large Model Time Series Analysis in V2G Context
projects.description: Anhui Province Local Standard Plan Project
highlights: Research on power battery health prediction algorithm based on charge-discharge cycle characteristics
Participated in the development of new energy vehicle power battery status measurement and management system

software.name: RMS: Intelligent Vehicle Maintenance Management System V1.0
